name: IDFC FIRST Millennia Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Other retail spends up to Rs 20,000
Dining, Travel, International, Birthday, and incremental spends above Rs 20,000
Utility, insurance, FASTag, and railway transactions

additionalBenefits: Lifetime free credit card with zero joining and annual fees
4 complimentary railway lounge visits per quarter
25% off on movie tickets up to Rs 100 per month via District app
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs 200 per statement cycle
Reward points are valid for 24 months

salaried: Minimum net monthly salary of Rs 25,000

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
3X reward points (1.5 per Rs 100 spent) on standard spends up to Rs 20,000 per statement cycle.
10X reward points (5.0 per Rs 100 spent) on Dining, Travel, International, Birthday spends, and incremental spends above Rs 20,000.
1X reward points (0.5 per Rs 100 spent) on utility, insurance, FASTag, and railway spends.
Complimentary railway lounge access is subject to a spend threshold of Rs 20,000 in the previous calendar month.
